## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, in 1–2 sentences? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Clinical formula / validation change

## Clinical-logic checklist

<!-- Required only if this PR touches src/utils/calculations.ts or in-app formula text. -->

- [ ] A reference source (guideline / paper) is cited in the PR and in code
- [ ] Acceptance tests added/updated with **independently computed** values
- [ ] In-app text (Formulas/Disclaimer) and README formula table updated if user-visible
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run ci` passes (lint + typecheck + test)
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] Manually tested on iOS and/or Android (if UI changed)
